description:
This is a commemorative PGL 2022 Antwerp CS:GO Major Championship Coin which tracks your progress throughout the event, provides full access to the Antwerp 2022 Pick'Em Challenge, Steam.tv chat flairs, coin challenges, and unlimited graffiti opportunities in-game for the duration of the event.

Upgrade your Antwerp 2022 Coin by completing coin challenges. Earn a Souvenir Token every time you upgrade your coin.
name: Antwerp 2022 Silver Coin
